summary: Completed testing of Ben's Road Service landing page - all new features working correctly. Quote section appears right after Hero, location sharing button functional, estimate API returns correct pricing, 'Call Ben for Exact Price' and 'Or Text Ben' CTAs appear after estimate, Google Map shows 100-mile radius from Salem.
passed_tests: Backend API: /api/ root endpoint returns success (9/9 pytest tests passed)
Backend API: /api/quote/estimate correctly calculates pricing for all vehicle/service combinations
Backend API: /api/quote/request successfully creates quote requests
Page Layout: Quote section appears IMMEDIATELY after Hero section
Page Layout: Order verified as Hero -> Quote -> Services -> Why Us -> Reviews -> Gallery -> Service Area
Location Button: Crosshair icon button exists next to pickup location input
Location Button: Helper text 'Click the location icon to share your GPS' visible
Quote Form: All inputs present (pickup, dropoff, vehicle type, service type, phone, distance)
Quote Form: Vehicle type dropdown selects correctly
Quote Form: Service type dropdown selects correctly
Quote Form: Emergency/Scheduled toggle buttons work
Quote Form: Get My Estimate button calls /api/quote/estimate API
Estimate Result: Price breakdown shows Base Service, Mileage, Emergency Fee, Total
Estimate Result: 'Call Ben for Exact Price' button appears with tel:9713886300 link
Estimate Result: 'Or Text Ben' button appears with pre-filled SMS message
Estimate Result: Warning banner shows 'This is an ESTIMATE only. Call Ben now...'
Estimate Result: 'Modify Estimate' button allows returning to form
Google Map: Service area section shows wider Oregon area (100-mile radius)
Google Map: Map displays Salem, Portland, Eugene, coast visible in viewport
Google Map: Text shows '100+ Mile Service Radius from Salem'
seed_data_creation: Test quote request created with TEST_ prefix for identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from iteration 3 are working: Quote section positioned after Hero, location sharing button present, estimate flow shows Call/Text Ben CTAs, Google Map shows 100-mile radius. Backend pricing calculations verified for all 7 service types and 6 vehicle types. Geolocation requires browser permission - cannot be automated but button and flow are correctly implemented.
